message:
test(runtime): Add comprehensive asciicast recorder tests (bd-10i.11)

15 new tests (was 2) covering: header format, event recording (output
and input), event counting, JSON escaping (all special chars, control
chars, normal text), AsciicastWriter mirroring, accessor methods,
empty recording edge case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
